region: Plano, Texas — Collin County, 20 miles north of Dallas

material_conditions.scarcity_profile: Comfortable — abundance anxiety rather than material want
material_conditions.technology_tier: Late industrial transitioning to early digital

power_structure.political_form: Municipal suburbia nested in conservative state politics
power_structure.enforcement: HOAs, school administration, social pressure, police

mobility_constraints.class: Meritocratic mythology — real mobility requires credentials and connections
mobility_constraints.gender: Softening patriarchy — women work but motherhood remains primary identity
mobility_constraints.ethnicity: Structural advantage for white families, polite exclusion for others

worldview.dominant: Protestant work ethic filtered through consumer capitalism
worldview.relationship_to_nature: Instrumental — nature is landscaping, weather, and weekend lake trips
worldview.relationship_to_authority: Deferential to institutional authority, skeptical of government

collective_trauma: Cold War hangover — triumphalism masking purposelessness
Oklahoma City bombing (1995) — domestic terror shatters heartland safety narrative
Plano teen heroin epidemic (1997-1998) — suburban paradise narrative collapses
Columbine (1999) — schools become sites of fear

information_environment.primary_medium: Cable television, transitioning to early internet
information_environment.censorship: Social rather than legal — what is sayable is controlled by community norms
